headless.when: ( "linux" in task["test-platform"] && ( "mochitest-plain" in task["try-name"] || "marionette" in task["try-name"] ) ) || "web-platform-tests-wdspec" == task["try-name"]

a11y-checks.when: ( "linux" in task["test-platform"] && "opt" in task["test-platform"] && !( "asan" in task["test-platform"] || "tsan" in task["test-platform"] || "ccov" in task["test-platform"] ) ) && ( "mochitest-devtools-chrome" == task["try-name"] || "mochitest-browser-chrome" == task["try-name"] || "mochitest-browser-chrome-thunderbird" == task["try-name"] )
